generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder electronic speed controller (ESC) that receives motor voltage commands to control vehicle speed"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo that receives angle commands to steer the vehicle"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUst110LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-110LX 2-D LiDAR providing raw point‑cloud measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera delivering depth images"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleTelemetrySubsystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal vehicle telemetry extracting ego speed and steering angle from chassis electronics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TelemetryDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance LiDARDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst110LxLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance TelemetryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleTelemetrySubsystem
]

// C5: Data
instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point‑cloud data generated by the LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image frames produced by the RealSense camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) captured from telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TelemetryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks (position, velocity) after DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance ACCReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated ACC performance reports stored in the SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN point‑cloud clustering algorithm used for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANLibraryEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for multi‑target tracking of clustered objects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterLibraryEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) control model compliant with ISO 15622 (performance class I)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCAlgorithmEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware over Wi‑Fi for message transport between PT, DT, and UI"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation functional entity serialising, unit‑converting and aligning messages before delivery to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DBSCANLibraryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Library implementation of DBSCAN used by the clustering model"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance KalmanFilterLibraryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Library implementation of Kalman filter used by the tracking model"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution environment for the ACC control algorithm and downstream actions"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database persisting time‑series vehicle state, object tracks and generated reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI visualises real‑time speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path; generates downloadable reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm runs in the Digital Twin, off‑loading lead‑vehicle detection and speed computation from the onboard ECU"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustACCParametersAction
    DTDFVocab:provides DisableACCAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operators can enable/disable ACC, adjust desired speed, and issue emergency brake commands from the UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustACCParametersAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides operators with real‑time visualisation of vehicle state and detected objects"
]

instance GenerateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates downloadable ACC performance reports for offline analysis"
]

instance AdjustACCParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator adjusts ACC desired speed or following distance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator disables the ACC function"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator issues an emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity computes ACC decisions (lead‑vehicle detection, desired speed) and sends control commands back to the PT over the same Wi‑Fi/ROS 2 channel. Commands include desired speed set‑points, ACC enable/disable flags, and emergency brake triggers, which are interpreted by the Actuation FE on the PT to drive the ESC and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system is designed for sub‑second operation with a maximum end‑to‑end latency of 100 ms from PT to DT (requirement R7) and clock synchronisation accuracy of 100 ms across components (requirement R8). Data collection, control and UI updates therefore occur at a 10 Hz‑plus rate."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation orchestrates the Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators, Data Pre‑Processing FE), the Digital Twin Entity (Data Collection, Reporting, Controlling, Presentation FEs) and the User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel UI FEs). Interaction is mediated by ROS 2 topics across a Wi‑Fi network, with each FE implemented as an independent ROS 2 package."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during the operational stage for real‑time monitoring, remote management and off‑loaded ACC computation, and also supports development/testing activities (e.g., data collection for debugging) as described in the case‑study methodology."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT maintains high fidelity through real‑time sensor fusion (LiDAR + depth camera), validated tracking using DBSCAN and Kalman filtering, and ACC logic compliant with ISO 15622. Latency <100 ms and clock sync ≤100 ms ensure temporal fidelity; safety‑critical nature mandates deterministic communication via ROS 2 over Wi‑Fi."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between PT and DT uses a Wi‑Fi network with ROS 2 as the middleware protocol. Data messages are serialized and translated by the Data Translation FE. The system also requires a standardized communication interface (requirement R1)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on the on‑board NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity executes on external compute resources (potentially cloud or edge server); User Entity UI runs on a workstation accessed by operators. Each entity is packaged as ROS 2 nodes and deployed on separate hardware."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture conforms to ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) reference architecture and uses ISO 15622 for ACC functionality. ISO/IEC 30173:2023 is referenced as a generic DT terminology standard. OPC UA is mentioned as a possible communication technology."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT is designed for safety‑critical operation, enforcing a maximum 100 ms latency and synchronized clocks to avoid timing errors. Remote commands (enable/disable ACC, emergency brake) are mediated through the User Entity UI. While explicit security mechanisms are not detailed, the use of standardized interfaces and controlled command pathways addresses basic safety concerns."
]
